_rules: Message IDs are never reused. Retired IDs are tombstoned, not recycled.
Community FBs must reserve a range here before publishing.
A PR reserving a community range requires: name, range, owner, contact.
CI lint verifies no two messages.iq files in the repo define the same ID.
Ranges are first-come, first-served within the community namespace.

core.description: Framework internals: lifecycle, fault, Observatory, watchdog, boot phases. Never use in application or community FBs.

official.description: Official EmbedIQ component FBs. Assigned by embediq/embediq repository maintainers.

community.description: Community and third-party FBs. Reserve a range here before publishing.

system_lifecycle.description: FB lifecycle: init, start, stop, fault, boot phase events

bus_control.description: Bus control: subscribe, unsubscribe, registry events

observatory.description: Observatory internal events: session start/stop, level change

fault.description: Fault and error codes: FAULT_*, ERROR_*

boot.description: Boot phase events: phase_start, phase_complete, phase_fault

watchdog_core.description: Watchdog internal messages: kick, miss_detected, reset_reason

reserved_core.description: Reserved for future core system use

fb_uart.description: UART platform FB: frame_rx, tx_request, overflow_event

fb_nvm.description: NVM platform FB: get, set, delete, schema_migration

fb_watchdog.description: Watchdog FB: register, checkin, unregister, reset_reason

fb_timer.description: Timer FB: tick_1ms, tick_10ms, tick_100ms, tick_1sec

fb_i2c.description: I2C platform FB: transfer_request, transfer_complete, error

fb_spi.description: SPI platform FB: transfer_request, transfer_complete, error

fb_cloud_mqtt.description: MQTT cloud FB: publish, subscribe, connect, disconnect, error

fb_ota.description: OTA FB: download_start, chunk, complete, verify, rollback

reserved_official.description: Reserved for future official EmbedIQ components

community_allocations._instructions: Add your entry here in a PR. Format: name, range (within 5120–65535), owner (GitHub URL), contact (email or GitHub handle).

fb_modbus_rtu_example.description: Modbus RTU over fb_uart. Reads/writes coils and registers.

MSG_SYS_OTA_REQUEST.description: OTA update imminent — FBs must flush state

MSG_SYS_OTA_READY.description: FB state flushed, safe to proceed with OTA

MSG_SYSTEM_READY.description: Boot phase complete — all FBs in phase initialised

MSG_WDG_MISSED_CHECKIN.description: A registered FB missed its checkin deadline

MSG_WDG_RESET_REASON.description: Reset reason emitted once on startup

tombstoned._description: Retired message IDs. These are never recycled. If you encounter these IDs in old firmware, they are no longer valid.
